nerdctl build --build-arg=kube_version=v1.36.1 --tag=image-prefix/cluster:<VERSION>-k8s.v1.36.1 --platform=linux/<ARCH> -f ./images/cluster/Dockerfile .
nerdctl push --platform=linux/<ARCH> image-prefix/cluster:<VERSION>-k8s.v1.36.1
nerdctl build --build-arg=kube_version=v1.35.5 --tag=image-prefix/cluster:<VERSION>-k8s.v1.35.5 --platform=linux/<ARCH> -f ./images/cluster/Dockerfile .
nerdctl push --platform=linux/<ARCH> image-prefix/cluster:<VERSION>-k8s.v1.35.5
nerdctl build --build-arg=kube_version=v1.34.8 --tag=image-prefix/cluster:<VERSION>-k8s.v1.34.8 --platform=linux/<ARCH> -f ./images/cluster/Dockerfile .
nerdctl push --platform=linux/<ARCH> image-prefix/cluster:<VERSION>-k8s.v1.34.8
